---
name: Feature or visualisation proposal
about: Propose a traceable improvement to NĀSADĪYA LIGHTCONE
title: "[Proposal] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem or opportunity

What would improve for a user, contributor, or scientific reviewer?

## Proposed change

Describe the browser, pipeline, documentation, accessibility, or data-layer change.

## Scientific and provenance impact

- Does this introduce a new observed, derived, mock, or annotation layer?
- What survey/release/source table is involved?
- What uncertainty, footprint, or selection effect must remain visible?
- What citation or acknowledgement is required?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] No raw large-survey files added to normal Git history
- [ ] Observed and derived content remain distinct
